scripts.build:server: npm run build --workspace=@handcricket/shared && npm run build --workspace=@handcricket/server
scripts.build:client: npm run build --workspace=@handcricket/shared && npm run build --workspace=@handcricket/client
scripts.build:all: npm run build --workspace=@handcricket/shared && npm run build --workspace=@handcricket/server && npm run build --workspace=@handcricket/client
